_comment: Condition A = neutral templates (no framing). Condition B = templates with explicit Implementation Intention + Commitment Contract. Variants are selected deterministically per (participation_id, day_index). Edit freely — there must be at least one entry per condition.
condition_A: It's time for your one-minute habit. Do one minute of bodyweight squats.
Take one minute right now and do a short set of standing stretches.
Pause for a minute and walk briskly in place.
Stand up and do one minute of calf raises.
Take one minute to roll your shoulders and stretch your neck.
condition_B: When this notification arrives, then I will do one minute of bodyweight squats. If I complete this, I will take a short, mindful break afterwards.
When this notification arrives, then I will do one minute of standing stretches. If I complete this, I will enjoy my next drink mindfully.
When this notification arrives, then I will walk briskly in place for one minute. If I complete this, I will take two minutes to sit and breathe.
When this notification arrives, then I will do one minute of calf raises. If I complete this, I will reward myself with a moment of fresh air.
When this notification arrives, then I will do one minute of shoulder rolls and neck stretches. If I complete this, I will treat myself to a quick favourite song.
